tasks.title: REA-342 — Fix hard-delete in /api/orders/delete
tasks.description: DELETE /api/orders/delete performs hard delete instead of soft-delete. Schema gaps: Dispatch.deletedAt and deletedBy missing. Promoted from QA fail on test REA-OMG-06.

tasks.title: REA-343 — Fix bulk-delete defects + S3 cleanup
tasks.description: 6 defects in src/app/api/orders/bulk-delete/route.ts: hard delete instead of soft, wrong S3 bucket name, BUCKET_NAME shadowed, path extraction fallback orphans files, storage errors swallowed, no orphan tracking. Promoted from QA fail on test REA-OMG-07.

tasks.title: REA-344 — Wire assignDriver realtime broadcast
tasks.description: No realtime broadcast emitted from assignDriver/route.ts. Infrastructure exists (broadcastDeliveryAssigned in lib/realtime/channels.ts:475) but has zero callers — admin dashboard requires reload. Secondary: Delivery upsert creates rows with deliveryAddress='' and swallows errors. Promoted from QA fail on test REA-OMG-08.

tasks.title: REA-DRT-07 — Bridge SSR cookie to browser supabase-js session (Realtime never initializes)
tasks.description: supabase.auth.getSession() returns null in the browser; localStorage has no sb-<ref>-auth-token key after login. SSR cookie is set server-side but not bridged to the browser supabase-js client, so all Realtime-dependent flows (useRealtimeLocationTracking, useAdminRealtimeTracking) early-return and never open a WS connection. First investigation target: src/utils/supabase/client.ts vs src/middleware.ts — verify createBrowserClient cookie config matches the SSR client. Related: Sentry READY-SET-NEXTJS-1S (unhandled refresh rejection on /driver/tracking — patched on fix/auth-refresh-unhandled-rejection as graceful failure, but root cause is this bug). Reported by Fer in QA notes; no engineering ticket filed yet.

tasks.title: Pre-configure CaterCow staging webhook URL
tasks.description: Dispatcher landed (src/lib/services/partnerWebhookService.ts) and wired into the status route; scripts/update-partner-webhook.ts is ready. Still need to run it against the staging DB: PARTNER_SLUG=catercow WEBHOOK_URL=https://api.staging.steerdelivery.com/webhooks/ready_set pnpm tsx scripts/update-partner-webhook.ts. Their endpoint isn't live yet, so dispatcher will log [partner-webhook] misconfigured until webhookSecret is also set.

tasks.title: Generalize outbound webhook dispatcher (partner-registry-driven)
tasks.description: New src/lib/services/partnerWebhookService.ts reads webhookUrl/webhookSecret from the api_partners row at send time. Wired into /api/catering-requests/[orderId]/status/route.ts for partners not in CARRIER_CONFIGS. HMAC-SHA256 signed per API_CONTRACT.md (x-readyset-signature); 3-attempt retry, no-retry on 4xx; 6 new unit tests; existing 161 cater-valley tests still green.

tasks.title: Generate + deliver CaterCow webhook HMAC secret
tasks.description: Generate a 256-bit secret (crypto.randomBytes(32)), set webhookSecret on the staging row, deliver to CaterCow via 1Password share link (7-day expiry). Trigger: their webhook endpoint becomes reachable.

tasks.title: Confirm CaterCow ↔ steerdelivery.com relationship with Gary
tasks.description: Nate's webhook URL is on steerdelivery.com, not catercow.com. Verify this is a known parent/shared-infra relationship before exchanging production HMAC secrets. Quick Slack to Gary should resolve.

tasks.title: Scope GET /orders/{id} for partner API v1.x
tasks.description: Pre-scoped in docs/catercow/IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md Phase 4.1 (~half day). Reads from catering_requests filtered by brokerage = partner.displayName, returns status + last 10 lifecycle events. Pull forward only if CaterCow flags as a go-live blocker.

tasks.title: OpenAPI 3.1 export from Zod schemas
tasks.description: Pre-scoped in docs/catercow/IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md Phase 4.2 (~half day). Generate from existing Zod schemas in src/app/api/partners/orders/*/route.ts using zod-to-openapi; output docs/catercow/openapi.yaml + a pnpm openapi:partners script. Defer until CaterCow flags it as needed.
